package_manager_evidence: No package.json/go.mod/Gemfile/requirements.txt/Cargo.toml found at repo root (confirmed by directory listing). System package installs inside scripts use apt (t480s_apps.sh:9,29,39) but that manages the OS, not this repo.
ci_evidence: .github/ does not exist in this repo (confirmed: find .github -> not found).

apply_gnome_settings.note: Several lines use sudo (t480s.sh:53-54); not idempotent-safe to re-run blindly on a different machine model.

install_packages_and_tools.note: Installs apt packages and several tools via curl/wget pipelines (t480s_apps.sh:60,94,123); requires sudo and network access.

toggle_gnome_overview.note: Designed to be invoked via a keyboard shortcut, not run directly by a human. Currently bound on this machine to Shift+Ctrl+Space via dconf custom-keybindings/custom0 (observed via `dconf dump`, not stored in this repo).

install_battery_alert.note: Symlinks battery_alert.py and battery-alert.service into ~/.local/bin and ~/.config/systemd/user, and renders battery-alert.timer from .env's POLL_INTERVAL. No sudo required. Re-run after editing .env to refresh the generated timer.
